reviews.text:
Anyone who has dealt with the IRS knows how overwhelming and stressful the process can be. Our case was not only stressful but extremely unique, complex, and deeply unjust. We were assessed penalties and fines for issues that were not even caused by us, and for over five years, this situation placed an enormous emotional burden on our family creating constant anxiety and even conflict between my spouse and me.

Finding a law firm willing and capable of taking on such a complicated case was incredibly difficult. That’s when we learned about Attorney Sammy Kim. Even though we live in a different state, we decided to entrust her with our case and that decision changed everything.

This was a long and challenging battle. Throughout the entire process, Attorney Kim never gave up on us. She demonstrated unwavering dedication, persistence, and genuine care, advocating for us tirelessly with the IRS. This was not just legal representation; it was personal, thoughtful, and deeply committed support during one of the most difficult periods of our lives.

This week, we finally received an official letter from the IRS confirming a positive resolution. When Attorney Kim personally called us even over the weekend to share the good news, it was a moment of immense relief and gratitude for our entire family. After years of stress, we were finally able to close this chapter with peace of mind.

Attorney Sammy Kim is more than an attorney. She is a true advocate who stands by her clients until the very end. For anyone facing an IRS issue that feels hopeless or overwhelming, I cannot recommend her highly enough. Our family will always be grateful for her professionalism, determination, and heart.

From the onset, Sammy's team was highly communicative confirming the appointment times via email and text reminders. I really appreciated the high touch comms and prep work that Sammy did before our call to review our intake form.

Sammy walked us through the best practices for managing our growing small business. I really appreciated her insights and strategic guidance.

I'm looking forward to bringing Sammy onboard to help us as we continue to grow our small business to ensure we're in compliance at the city, county, state, and federal levels.

Sammy has a wonderful way about her and her delivery is top notch. I didn't need a law textbook to understand the best practices. Everything was shared in layman's terms and was easy to understand.

Sammy Kim and her team are excellent at solving complex tax issues. They work efficiently and with caring and support for the client. Years of tax issues were resolved in a matter of weeks. I will forever be grateful. Would recommend 100%.

I know what you're thinking. This place has 5 stars and no negative reviews. That's exactly what I thought when I first started looking for a competent lawyer a couple years ago. Sammy wasn't the first lawyer I spoke to. Before her, I had contacted multiple lawyers but felt like they saw an easy case and an easy way to make money. I eventually took a chance with Sammy Kim and her team, and it has been a perfect journey ever since.

What sets Sammy apart is her genuine care for clients and her honest, straightforward approach. While other lawyers tried to intimidate me with worst-case scenarios and demanded large upfront fees, Sammy took the time to understand my situation and provide reliable, truthful guidance. Her empathy and dedication to solving problems rather than just collecting fees made all the difference. It's not an exaggeration to say she saved my life during what felt like an overwhelming situation.

The breadth of her expertise is remarkable. She helped me navigate complex international FBARs (which were late), handled paperwork for selling my apartment abroad, managed my inheritance and the 3520a inheritance form (also late), tackled NYC UBT self-employment taxes when I was completely overwhelmed, and even assisted with cryptocurrency and stock accounting. At this point, I don't think there's anything she can't do.

I also want to give a special shout-out to Karen and Chloe on her team, and anyone else who was working behind the scenes. They're equally professional and empathetic, always treating my situation with care and understanding. It's clear that Sammy has built a team that shares her values.

Beyond her professional skills, Sammy treats you like a person, not a case number. She sends Christmas cards and remembers the little details about your life. These thoughtful touches remind you that you're working with someone who genuinely cares.

As someone navigating the U.S. tax system from an international background, finding Sammy felt like finding a lifeline - but her care and expertise would benefit anyone, regardless of their situation. I normally don't write reviews, but exceptional service like this deserves to be recognized so others can find the help they need.

If you're looking for a lawyer who will treat you like a person rather than a paycheck, I cannot recommend Sammy highly enough.

Thank you for such a generous and thoughtful review. It truly made my day. Karen, Chloe, and the team will be smiling when they read your kind words.

Tax issues (especially international ones) can feel overwhelming very quickly, and I’m glad you felt supported rather than pressured. Helping clients move from panic to clarity—without scare tactics—is exactly why we do this work.

And to anyone reading this who’s feeling buried by tax problems: you’re not alone, and yes, there is a way forward.
Gratefully,
Sammy

I own a small restaurant in Prince William County and was completely unaware of the new local county-level sales tax obligations after relocating from New York. My longtime CPA and I had been remitting 100% of collected sales taxes to the Virginia tax department, not realizing that some of it was supposed to go to the County. As a result, my business was audited and faced a significant tax bill, penalties, and interest from the County.

I was overwhelmed and didn’t know how to fix the issue. I’m so glad I reached out to Attorney Sammy Kim. Her expertise in both local and state-level tax compliance gave me confidence from the very beginning. Sammy took charge of my case with a clear, detailed strategy. She resolved the County audit issue first by negotiating the penalty abatement and reducing the amount owed. Then she went above and beyond—she reviewed our entire sales tax history, discovered we had overpaid state taxes due to reporting errors by the CPA, and filed over two years’ worth of amended monthly sales tax returns with the Virginia Department of Taxation.

Thanks to her work, we received almost $39,000 in refunds from the Virginia Tax within just a few months! I expected the case to drag into next year, but the process was surprisingly fast and smooth.

This refund lifted a huge financial burden from my small business. I’m still shocked by how efficiently everything was handled. Sammy treated my case like it mattered, and her attention to detail and persistence made all the difference. I’m incredibly grateful and relieved.

Thanks, Sammy!

reviews.text:
In 2023, after buying our home the year before, we discovered our roof had suffered catastrophic water damage. We later learned our bank had failed to pay our homeowner’s insurance through escrow, and our policy had lapsed without our knowledge. That mistake left us with more than $150K in repair costs out of pocket.

Finding legal help for something this complicated was overwhelming—most firms wanted retainers before even understanding and investigating the merit of our case. Then I found McNichol and the team at Kelly Gusso through a realtor recommendation, and the experience was completely different. Pat and his team spent nearly two months reviewing documents, asking thoughtful questions, and understanding every angle of the situation before officially taking us on as clients.

They were transparent, collaborative, and realistic from the start. Knowing the financial position we were in, they agreed to work on a contingency basis, which gave us both peace of mind and confidence that they believed in the strength of our case.

A few months later, we reached a successful settlement that not only validated everything we had gone through but also helped us recover financially. Pat and Kelly Guzzo firm were professional, thorough, and genuinely invested in the outcome.

If you’re up against a large institution or dealing with a complex property or insurance issue, I highly recommend Kelly Gusso firm. They bring both expertise and integrity to the table—and that combination made all the difference for us.

I cannot say enough good things about this firm, especially Ms. Kelly and Mr. Rosendahl. They truly care about getting justice for regular working people who may feel disempowered to stand up to large corporations who have wronged them. Highly recommend!
This law firm was awesome to work with! They really listened, knew their stuff, and got me a solid result. Couldn’t ask for a better lawyer—definitely recommend!

I served as a juror in the Medical Learning Center case, and on behalf of the entire jury, I want to recognize Kristi C. Kelly, Matt Rosenthal, Casey Nash, and the whole team—what a show! I was facing a charge of Reckless Driving for speeding on I66 at midnight. This is considered a Class 1 Misdemeanor in the state of Virginia. Having something like Reckless Driving on your record is on par with having a DUI. This charge also carries a chance for jail time (up to a year).

I was incredibly scared because I had never faced such a charge. And looking into Virginia Law, my speed exceeded 90mph, which is quite serious.

I retained Dave Albo to help me with this case. Since my record was clean, Dave had advised I do the following before my trial.

* Take a DMV Driver's Improvement Course

* Take a Behavior Modification Course

* Do 100 hours of community service

* Print my DMV Record one week before the trial

On the day of my trial, Dave got my Reckless Driving charge REDUCED to a regular Speeding charge. This was the absolute best case scenario for me.

No criminal record.
No jail time.
No suspension of license.

I did receive 6 demerit points and had to pay a fine of $250 (plus court fees). But that's a slap on the wrist, compared to what I could have been facing.

reviews.text: Arthur Pickett helped me with my case in mid November of this year. I had received a summons to appear for court for Reckless Driving (94/55) in VA. After doing research on a couple of different laws firms, I decided to go with The Pickett Law Group. When I called, Arthur answered the phone and I began to tell him the details of my case. He explained to me, what the next steps were should I decide to hire him. I was quoted a fixed price (that did not change), and he told me what classes I needed to take to help my case. All instructions were explained in his email to me. The day before the hearing, he called to follow up and answer any questions I had for him. Let me say, upon reflection, I am soooo happy I hired him as my lawyer. I arrived at court and was immediately comforted by his detailed explanation of what was going on in terms of where we on the judge's docket and what we were waiting for (him to speak to the prosecution).  I did complete my courses (very important). He went in and spoke to the prosecution and when he came out, he said we actually got a better deal than he originally anticipated.  The Reckless Driving charge was reduced to speeding and my fine was cut in half. This meant, if the judge accepted it, my license would be saved. He also reassured me on what would happen if the judge did not accept the deal and the next steps after that. He was even kind enough to entertain my son as we were waiting to be called. When went before a judge.....I knew I had made the right decision in hiring Mr. Aruthr Pickett. The judge said I "'should be very grateful to Mr. Pickett for this deal because if it were up to [him], he would have suspended my license. They is no reason anyone should be driving 94 mph."" The judge accepted the deal and we walked out of the courtroom. HIRE THIS LAW FIRM!!!!! I cannot express my deepest thanks to the Pickett Law Group and in particular, Arthur Pickett in helping me navigate this case. reviews.text: My son retained attorney Swinton for a case that had previously been dismissed by nolle prosequi back in October 2018. He found out March 9th, 2025, that the case had been re-opened for prosecution back in October, 2019. Since this happened in Arlington, Va. and we live in Nashville, Tn., he was never informed and had no idea he was considered a fugitive and a warrant had been issued for his arrest. Since he hadn’t been in any trouble since 2018 we were quite confused about how this could happen. His previous attorney referred us to Ms. Swinton, who graciously took on his case. She informed him on what he needed to do and let him know she would be right there. He had to fly from Nashville to Virginia to turn himself in. She had already talk to the bail bondsman, who knew the situation and was ready to post his bail. We arrived in Virginia Sunday evening March 23rd. He turned himself in on Monday afternoon, March 24th and she was right there with him through the whole process. She was able to meet with the magistrate that day and got him set up for arraignment at 9:30 the following morning Tuesday the 25th. At the arraignment she asked the prosecutor to dismiss the charges, since it didn’t make much sense to anybody why he was even there. The initial arrest was 2018! The prosecutor agree, the judge signed off on it and we were back in Nashville Tuesday evening. That’s what I am talking about! She communicated with us on everything and kept us informed. She didn’t miss a beat. The representation she provided was worth every penny and then some. We owe her a debt of gratitude. I highly recommend Attorney Swinton!

I am unhappy with my current representation, and asked another attorney, who had formerly represented me, for assistance in choosing another one. He recommended KCNF. I dialed the phone number he provided, and received an automated message, instructing me only to leave a message for extension 43. This was at 3:00 pm on a Monday. I decided to try again, and the second time reached a person. She had a heavy accent (which in and of itself is not something to hold against someone), and didn't behave as though she works for a law firm. She seemed unsure of how to proceed as I explained my issue. She decided to laboriously record my name, phone number and other demographics. I could tell she was handwriting my information. She did explain that an intake specialist would contact me.

Later, an intake specialist, Chris, did call me, at 4:30 pm, saying he had "one more question" for me. He wanted to know more about my issue, which I explained. His response was: "So you just have some questions about your case?" I didn't have questions. I wanted representation. I explained that I was unhappy with current counsel. Chris promised that someone would call me "today." At 4:53 pm I did receive an email (not a phone call), from Elisabeth Baker-Pham, asking for a good time to speak. Ms. Baker-Pham's email bears no signature, leaving me with no way to determine her role within KCNF (unless she is listed at the website).

I have worked as a receptionist at law firms, and am always scrutinized for how professionally I treat clients, potential clients and staff. It is surprising that these three folks can get away with their shoddy performance.
reviews.ownerResponse: Good morning, April. I am sorry you found our intake process frustrating, and I appreciate you bringing this to our attention. I have spoken with our staff, and you have spoken with attorney Baker-Pham; we sincerely hope we have addressed your concerns.

I can't say I get the value of every dollar I spent with the Big Firms. But with Chris, I certainly feel I do; Even once I get counsel from big firms, I still go back to Chris D. to validate his thoughts because he is my one TRUSTED COUNSEL. Highly recommend Chris and his firm.
Chris has been the attorney for my company for over 2 years now. He is very knowledgeable, level-headed, and quick to respond to anything I need. Would definitely recommend!

When I met Ash Dean, he walked in with a command presence and connected with me in such a welcoming manner. Mr.Dean will give it to you straight and help you understand what you are going up against.

without a doubt the judge granted a denial to the request based on false accusation about my character due to lack of any kind of evidence that claimed I'm a violent individual.
